rows.label: qev030908_MSG0001
rows.name:
Grandpa Aldo... before he died, he told me to
make lots of children with Heptana and have a big family
just like he did, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030908_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I have to keep that promise, na.
And make the clan Grandpa left behind
even bigger, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030908_MSG0003
rows.name:
Grandpa Aldo... before he died, he told me to
make lots of children with Enneana and have a big family
just like he did, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030908_MSG0004
rows.name:
...I have to keep that promise, na.
And make the clan Grandpa left behind
even bigger, da. [ST:wait ]
